issues.detail: The skill file does not cover error handling or edge cases, focusing only on happy path examples.

scenarios.name: Create an order with line items atomically and decrement the user's balance
scenarios.rationale: Treatment wrapped the three writes in db.transaction(async (trx) => ...) using trx for every statement, used .returning('*') on the order insert, and called .decrement('balance', 99.99) on users; baseline used a Promise.all without a Knex transaction and a manual UPDATE balance = balance - x.

scenarios.name: Author the initial migration for users and posts with a composite index
scenarios.rationale: Treatment used knex migrate:make and a schema.createTable with t.increments primary, foreign key via references().inTable().onDelete('CASCADE'), and t.index(['author_id','published']); baseline wrote raw CREATE TABLE SQL inside a migration without the schema builder helpers.
